claim.statement: Record an audit trail for consequential operator and admin actions (who did what, to which object, when, and the prior/after state) so high-impact changes are traceable, recoverable, and reviewable. Make recent actions visible to the operator where feasible.

limitations: This is a UX/operational-traceability recommendation, not legal or regulatory advice; retention and content requirements are domain- and jurisdiction-specific

do: Log actor, action, target, timestamp, and before/after state for consequential changes
Expose a recent-activity or history view to operators
Use the trail to support recovery and review of high-impact actions
avoid: High-impact operator actions with no record of who or what changed
Treating audit logging as a substitute for preventing accidental destructive actions

strategies: add audit logging on consequential mutations
